title: Public export DCO trailer human-review audit
scope: audit only; do not rewrite or submit patches yet

finding.issue: DCO trailer review must be explicit before send
evidence: Exported patches 0001 through 0004 contain Signed-off-by: Enzo Adriano <enzo.adriano.code@gmail.com>.
docs/mainline-cleanup-workflow.md says Signed-off-by is added only by the human submitter and final send requires human review with correct DCO sign-off.
finding.required_action_before_submission: Before any mailing, the human submitter must explicitly confirm the From identity and Signed-off-by trailers. Codex must not auto-send or silently modify these trailers.

next_action: Keep this as a pre-send gate with H080/H081/H082 export fixups.
